sections.paragraph:
Farthing From Greek »Assarion,« a Roman coin worth, in American money, about 1 1/2 cents; in English money, about 3 farthings
Mat 10:29; Luk 12:6
From Greek »Kodrantes,« worth, in American money, about two-fifths of a cent; in English money, less than a farthing
Mat 5:26; Mar 12:42
